header.name: Abdallah Shaltout
header.headline: Senior Full-Stack Developer · MEVN Stack · 5+ Years Experience

summary: Senior Full-Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience architecting and delivering enterprise-grade web applications for the MENA market. Specialized in the MEVN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, Vue.js/Nuxt.js, Node.js) with deep expertise in multi-tenant SaaS architecture, payment gateway integrations, and ZATCA-compliant e-invoicing systems. Built and scaled production platforms serving 5,000+ active merchants and 2,000+ businesses across Egypt and Saudi Arabia. Experienced in leading development teams, establishing engineering standards, and owning projects from architecture through deployment. Proficient in Arabic RTL interfaces and culturally appropriate design for Middle Eastern markets.

skills.items: Vue.js 3, Nuxt.js 3/4, TypeScript, Pinia, TailwindCSS, PrimeVue, Three.js, Vite, Webpack
Node.js, Express.js, TypeScript, REST API Design, BullMQ, Socket.IO, JWT, OAuth 2.0
MongoDB, Mongoose, Redis, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch
Docker, Coolify, Traefik, AWS S3, Cloudinary, Firebase, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Linux (Ubuntu)
MyFatoorah, Tabby, Tamara, STC Pay, Stripe, Mada, ZATCA e-Invoicing, WhatsApp Business API, Twilio, FCM/APNS
Multi-tenant SaaS, Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, CQRS, Offline-First, Dynamic Subdomain Routing
Git, Postman, Jest, Bun, pnpm, ESLint, Prettier, Agile/Scrum, Code Review, Technical Mentorship

jobs.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
jobs.meta: Zakham Company · Digital Marketing & Development · Cairo, Egypt / Saudi Arabia · zakham-sa.com
bullets: Lead engineer on tadberat.com, a production multi-vendor marketplace currently serving 5,000+ active stores with hundreds of millions SAR in annual transaction volume.
Designed and implemented a multi-tenant SaaS architecture with complete tenant isolation, dynamic wildcard subdomain routing via Traefik, and per-merchant custom domain SSL provisioning.
Built a ZATCA Phase 2–compliant e-invoicing engine with automated XML generation, digital signing, and QR code stamping to meet Saudi tax authority requirements.
Integrated 5 payment gateways (MyFatoorah, Tabby, Tamara, STC Pay, Mada) into a unified checkout layer with webhook handling, refund processing, and financial reconciliation.
Engineered Redis caching strategies and MongoDB aggregation pipeline optimizations that achieved a 60% reduction in API response times under high-concurrency conditions.
Architected Docker-based deployment pipelines on Coolify with zero-downtime deployments, centralized log management, and automated health monitoring.
Led and mentored a team of 5 developers; established TypeScript-first conventions, structured code review processes, and sprint planning workflows that improved delivery velocity.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Core developer of farook.app, a cloud-based POS and accounting platform serving 2,000+ businesses across Saudi Arabia, maintaining a 99.9% uptime SLA.
Architected an offline-first POS system with background sync, conflict resolution, and real-time inventory tracking across multiple branches and locations.
Built a BullMQ-based distributed job queue for scheduled billing, automated financial report generation, and high-throughput background processing.
Developed a multi-channel notification engine integrating Firebase FCM/APNS, WhatsApp Business API, and Twilio SMS for both transactional and marketing communications.
Delivered ZATCA-compliant invoicing for the Saudi market, including VAT automation and certified digital invoice formats.
Optimized MongoDB schemas, compound indexes, and aggregation queries, reducing average execution time by 45% on core reporting modules.

jobs.title: Freelance Full-Stack Developer
jobs.meta: Remote · Clients across Egypt, Saudi Arabia, and UAE
bullets: Delivered 10+ end-to-end projects including e-commerce stores, SaaS dashboards, corporate websites, and custom business tools for regional clients.
Managed the complete project lifecycle independently: discovery, architecture, development, Docker deployment, and client handover.
Notable deliveries include newmetalsteel.com, ps-adv.com, sysattaf.shop, and multiple private production systems.
Maintained 94 repositories (23 public, 71 private) spanning production applications, internal tools, and reusable component libraries.

projects.description: Full-featured cloud POS with offline-first architecture, real-time inventory management, multi-branch support, automated billing, ZATCA e-invoicing, and comprehensive financial reporting.

projects.name: tadberat.com
projects.subtitle: Multi-Vendor Marketplace Platform

projects.description: Enterprise multi-tenant marketplace with per-merchant storefronts, ZATCA-compliant invoicing, unified payment gateway layer, custom domain mapping, merchant analytics, and automated shipping integrations (Aramex, SMSA, FedEx).

projects.name: Al-Attaf
projects.subtitle: Home Services SaaS Platform
projects.stack: Nuxt 3 · Express · BullMQ · Firebase · WhatsApp API
projects.description: Multi-service booking SaaS with dynamic job scheduling, real-time provider matching, multi-channel notification engine (push, SMS, WhatsApp), and B2B provider management dashboard.

projects.name: Citadel Medical Center
projects.subtitle: Appointment Booking System
projects.description: Production medical booking platform with OTP authentication, doctor availability engine with Saudi timezone handling, online payment processing with installment options, loyalty rewards system, and patient management dashboard.

education.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science & Information Technology
